title: Stock Market Today (June 11, 2026): Nasdaq, S&P 500 rise after Trump, Iran signal deal is close
summary: S&P 500 +1.75%, Dow +927pts to 50,845, Nasdaq +2.54%, Russell 2000 +3.02%. Trump cancelled Iran strikes after both sides signaled peace deal near. VIX -12%. PPI +1.1% MoM (+6.5% YoY).

title: Stock market today: Dow surges 900 points, Nasdaq, S&P 500 soar as Trump suggests deal with Iran is close
summary: Brent crude -3.3% below $90, WTI -3% near $87. ECB hiked to 2.25%. Oracle -10% on $40B funding plan. INTC upgraded by BofA to Buy, PT $135. Virgin Galactic +23%, Rocket Lab +5% on SpaceX IPO halo.

title: NVDA, AMD, DELL, SMCI: Why AI Hardware and Chip Stocks Are Rising Today — June 11, 2026
summary: Oracle's $70B data center plan lifted AI hardware: NVDA +2.2%, AMD +8%, DELL +5.85%, SMCI +9.22%. AMD boosted by Zen 6 leaks (6.6 GHz) and BofA upgrade to $560 PT. NVDA consensus Strong Buy with ~50% upside.

title: United States Stock Market Index — June 11, 2026
Bitcoin News Digest — June 11, 2026
summary: BTC ~$62,600. Fear & Greed 12 (extreme fear). BTC ETFs 4th straight outflow day, cumulative >$4.4B. SpaceX IPO liquidity drain. CPI 4.2% triggered VIX spike to 22. FOMC June 16-17 with hawkish Chair Warsh. BlackRock BITA ETF filing.

title: Gold prices today, Thursday, June 11, 2026: Lowest opening since Nov. '25 following U.S. airstrikes
summary: Gold Aug futures opened at $4,094.40 (lowest since Nov 2025), down 0.9% from prior close of $4,133.30. YoY gain down to +23% from +95.6% in January. Fed rate hike expectations suppressing gold.

title: Treasury Yield Curve Today: June 11, 2026 — Rates & Spread Monitor
summary: 10Y at 4.53%, 2Y at 4.13%. 10Y-2Y spread +0.40pp (normal). 5Y breakeven 2.44%, 10Y breakeven 2.33%. FOMC June 16-17. CPI 4.2% YoY, core 2.8%.

title: Fed Signals Shift At June Meeting With Markets Pricing In 2026 Hike
summary: Fed may drop easing bias at June meeting as inflation stays high and jobs remain strong. Markets pricing in potential 2026 rate hike. FOMC June 16-17 under new Chair Kevin Warsh.

title: DXY — U.S. Dollar Index
summary: DXY at 99.92, down 0.09%. Intraday high 100.18. Previous close 99.95. 1-year gain +2.31%. Range-bound between 98.80-100.50.

title: 2026 Investment Grade Credit Outlook: At a Turning Point?
summary: IG spreads near 25-year tights. Macro backdrop calls for moderate spread widening. Supply is rising, demand may be tested. Credit selection increasingly important.

title: SpaceX targets $135 IPO price at valuation of $1.77 trillion
summary: SpaceX IPO priced at $135/share, raising $75B at $1.77T valuation. Largest IPO in history. 4x oversubscribed with $150B+ in total bids. Trading begins June 12 on Nasdaq as SPCX.

title: Stock Market News for Jun 11, 2026
summary: Nasdaq Composite finished at 25,169.50 on June 10 (-2%). Chip stocks had worst day in years. Oracle earnings beat but stock fell. AI semiconductor rebound June 11.

title: CME Group Announces First Trades for New Bitcoin Volatility Futures
summary: CME Bitcoin Volatility Index futures launched. ADV of 266,900 contracts, up 38% YoY. First trades executed June 5, 2026.
